x.tweet: day 1: we shipped a tiny site that proves our daily build-deploy-social pipeline actually works. hello, world.

vertical_caption: day 1 of a new daily series: tiny self-contained websites, one per day. this first one is proof of concept for the whole pipeline. check it out.
shorts_description_lead: Day 1 of gooboolygoo/projects: a daily series shipping one tiny website every day. This first site proves the entire build, deploy, and social pipeline works end-to-end.

video.title: Day 1: Hello, World
video.script: Every day, a new tiny website ships from gooboolygoo/projects. Today is day one, and it's a simple hello world page. Nothing fancy, just proof that the whole pipeline works—the builder, the deployer, and the social post generator. It's a meta project about shipping daily. If you're curious about how these things get made, follow along. Link in the description.
